block_public_policy.description: Indicates whether to block resource policies that allow broad public access, ensuring the secret's policy is restricted to trusted identities.

policy.description: Defines the permissions policy for the Secrets Manager secret, specifying who can access and manage the secret. Must be a valid JSON policy document.

secret_arn.description: ARN of the Secrets Manager secret to which the policy will be applied; must be a valid Amazon Resource Name.
